signals.headline: Solana Hits 167M Monthly Token Holders Record | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Solana Hits 167M Monthly Token Holders Record | YES | HIGH confidence**

As of April 14, 2026, Solana achieved an **all-time record of 167 million monthly token holders**, with daily non-vote transactions reaching 148 million[1]. The **Alpenglow consensus upgrade** was confirmed to slash transaction finality from 12 seconds to just 150 milliseconds[1]. Additionally, **institutional interest streng

signals.headline: Technical Breakdown Confirmed | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Technical Breakdown Confirmed | YES | HIGH confidence**

A **head and shoulders pattern breakout was confirmed on March 27**, projecting a downside target near $73[2]. However, **bullish divergence has formed on the daily timeframe**, suggesting downward momentum may be weakening[3], with price consolidating near support at $78.87[3].

signals.headline: Powell's mid-March 2026 presser addressed tariff shocks as likely "one-time" price increases, not persistent inflation,
signals.raw: Powell's mid-March 2026 presser addressed tariff shocks as likely "one-time" price increases, not persistent inflation, with expectations of tariff effects easing mid-year after court-overturned tariffs were partially replaced[4].

signals.raw: Fed's prior policy decision (likely early April) held rates at 3.5-3.75%, penciled in one 2026 cut (H2 at earliest), cited higher 2026 inflation projections including oil shocks and Trump's 15% blanket tariff[2][6].

signals.headline: Fed's March 2026 meeting minutes (released ~April 8) showed more officials open to 2026 rate hikes due to Iran war-drive
signals.raw: Fed's March 2026 meeting minutes (released ~April 8) showed more officials open to 2026 rate hikes due to Iran war-driven oil/gas price spikes risking sustained inflation (forecast March CPI at 3.4% YoY vs. Feb 2.4%; Fed targets 2%)[1][2].

signals.headline: Elon Musk April Tweet Count Markets Lead Polymarket Activity | NO whale bets or resolved events reported | LOW confidenc
signals.raw:
Elon Musk April Tweet Count Markets Lead Polymarket Activity | NO whale bets or resolved events reported | LOW confidence**

Polymarket's most active markets right now focus on **Elon Musk tweet predictions**, such as "Elon Musk # tweets April 17 - April 24, 2026?" where traders price outcomes like "200-219" at 29% and the top market "Elon Musk # tweets in April 2026?" at 18% for "1080-1119"[1][2]
